display.purpose: Page-level titles and large hero numbers.

body.purpose: Default readable text across lists, charts, and descriptions.

shadows.name: low
shadows.purpose: Subtle hover states on cards and dropdown lists.

motion.name: standard-ease
motion.purpose: Smooth transition for buttons, links, and sidebar highlights.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button used for submitting forms, saving details, or adding items.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #1f9c88; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #177d6d; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Base container for grouping sections, forms, and dashboard widgets.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1c212c; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; color: #4d5a75; }

narrative.overview: DeveleERP's design system represents a clean, high-trust, structured, and highly localized interface. It is optimized for data-dense business operations in Tanzania, prioritizing clean typography, structured layouts, and bilingual (English/Swahili) balance.
keyCharacteristics: Refined and Restrained: Lean borders, minimal drop shadows, flat layouts.
Bilingual Visual Weight: Spacing and headers designed to balance English and Swahili terms.
The Emerald Anchor: Focused usage of the primary brand green (#1f9c88) on actions.

rules.name: The Emerald Constraint Rule
rules.body: The brand color (#1f9c88) must not cover more than 10% of any screen surface. It is reserved for primary actions, badges, and focus items to direct attention.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Elements do not float. Shadows are only used under active dropdown lists, open modals, or subtle hover responses.

dos: Do use a flat border outline (#e2e8f0) to structure tables and grids.
Do apply equal Swahili and English translation strings to every card header, button text, and list cell.
Do use 12px (rounded-md) for buttons and form fields, and 16px (rounded-lg) for cards.
donts: Don't use border-left/right larger than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't add new top-level items to the sidebar (all sub-functions must be embedded inside page components).
